data.content: Revised plan for knots-5464 complete. Key decisions: (1) Canonical vocabulary defined — branch, pull_request, merged_main, local, note, approval, live_deployment — with explicit normalization rules for all legacy strings (commit→merged_main, remote_main→merged_main, remote→branch, pr→pull_request). (2) Unknown target strings are rejected at parse/load time, not warned. (3) Prompt rendering will be rewired to accept resolved StepMetadata.output rather than reading profile.outputs directly. (4) All 8 prompt/skill files that reference {{ output }} are in scope for canonical name updates. (5) Execution order remains c8f4→0d93→9727 (sequential). Children are all in ready_for_planning and need re-planning with this canonical vocabulary as the foundation.
